b: X
wlx0, x0, wrx0, wlx1, x1, wrx1, wlx2, x2, wrx2: a = b
wly0, y0: b = b
wly1, y1: a = a
wlz0, z0: b = b
wlz1, z1: a = a
urnat_x0: wrx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0
urnat_x1: wrx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1
urnat_x2: wrx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2
ulnat_y0: wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0
urnat_y0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y0
ulnat_y1: wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1
urnat_y1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1
ulnat_z0: wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0
urnat_z0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0
ulnat_z1: wlz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1
urnat_z1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1
ulnat_yz0: (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0)
ulnat_yz1: (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1)
ehlnat_x0: wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx0
ehlnat_x1: wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx1
ehlnat_x2: wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx2
ehrnat_y0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly0
ehrnat_y1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly1
ehrnat_z0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz0
ehrnat_z1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1
wlrnat_y_x: wly1 @ wrx1 = wrx0 @ wly0
wlrnat_z_x: wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0
H_ulnat_yz0: ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ ulnat_yz0
H_ulnat_yz1: ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ ulnat_yz1
ehrnat_p1_y0: (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0
ehrnat_p1_y1: (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1
ehrnat_p1_z0: (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0
ehrnat_p1_z1: (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1
forall (ehrnat_yz1 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
(H_ehrnat_yz1 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 =
                whiskerR 1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1),
(fun (q : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
   (s : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
    (s0 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
          whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
     (s1 : urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
      (s2 : urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
       (s3 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
        (s4 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
         (s5 : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)
          (x : (fun s6 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2 =>
                whiskerR s6 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
                (ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) b0) =>
        (fun (b1 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1)
           (x3 : (fun s6 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1 =>
                  whiskerR s6 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
                  (ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) b1) =>
         (fun (q6 : wlx0 @ (1 @ 1) = (1 @ 1) @ wlx2)
            (s6 : (b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2 = whiskerL wlx0 1 @ q6) =>
          P b a b a b wlx0 x0 wrx0 wlx1 x1 wrx1 wlx2 x2 wrx2 wly0 y0 1 wly1
            y1 1 wlz0 z0 1 wlz1 z1 1 (wly0 @ wlz0) 
            (1 @ 1) (wly1 @ wlz1) (1 @ 1) q5 urnat_x0 q4 urnat_x1 q3 urnat_x2
            ulnat_y0 urnat_y0 ulnat_y1 urnat_y1 ulnat_z0 urnat_z0 ulnat_z1
            urnat_z1 ulnat_yz0 q2 ulnat_yz1 q1 ehlnat_x0 ehlnat_x1 ehlnat_x2
            ehrnat_y0 ehrnat_y1 ehrnat_z0 ehrnat_z1 q ehrnat_yz1 b1
            wlrnat_y_x b0 wlrnat_z_x q6 q0 1 1 1 1 H_ulnat_yz0 s2 H_ulnat_yz1
            s1 s H_ehrnat_yz1 s6 s0 s5 s4 s3 ehrnat_p1_y0 ehrnat_p1_y1
            ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1 x3 x)
           ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
           (equiv_moveL_Mp
              ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
              ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2) (whiskerL wlx0 1) 1))
          (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
            (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @

          (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)

               (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @

             1))

   (equiv_moveL_Mp

      ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1)

  (equiv_moveL_Mp
     ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
     ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1)

a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x5 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y2 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y3 wry1 : a = c)

(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3)
(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)
(urnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_y3 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y3)
(urnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz2 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz3 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz2 ->
urnat_y2 [-] urnat_z2 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz3 ->
urnat_y3 [-] urnat_z3 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx5 =
whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
(wlrnat_y_x0 [-] wlrnat_z_x0) @ whiskerL wrx3 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx5 @ wlrnat_yz_x ->
(ehlnat_x3 [I] urnat_x3) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0 ->
(ehlnat_x4 [I] urnat_x4) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(ehlnat_x5 [I] urnat_x5) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->

(ehrnat_z2 [I] ulnat_z2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z2 ->
(ehrnat_z3 [I] ulnat_z3) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z3 ->

ehrnat_z1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1

wlrnat_z_x: wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0

H_ulnat_yz1: ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ ulnat_yz1

ehrnat_p1_z1: (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1
(fun (q : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
   (s : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
    (s0 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
     (s1 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
           whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
      (s2 : urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
       (s3 : urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
        (s4 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
         (s5 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
          (s6 : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q6) =>
        (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)

                 whiskerR s7 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =

         (fun (b1 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1)
            (x3 : (fun s7 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1 =>
                   whiskerR s7 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =

          (fun (q7 : wlx0 @ (1 @ 1) = (1 @ 1) @ wlx2)

             wlrnat_y_x b0 wlrnat_z_x q7 q1 1 1 1 1 H_ulnat_yz0 s3
             H_ulnat_yz1 s2 s0 s s7 s1 s6 s5 s4 ehrnat_p1_y0 ehrnat_p1_y1
             ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1 x3 x)
            ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
            (equiv_moveL_Mp

           (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @

            concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
           (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)

a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)

(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3)
(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)
(urnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_y3 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y3)
(urnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz1 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz2 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
urnat_y2 [-] urnat_z2 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz2 ->
urnat_y3 [-] urnat_z3 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->

whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx5 =
whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
(wlrnat_y_x0 [-] wlrnat_z_x0) @ whiskerL wrx3 wlpp_yz0 =

(ehlnat_x4 [I] urnat_x4) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(ehlnat_x5 [I] urnat_x5) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->

b: X

ulnat_y1: wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1
urnat_y1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1
ulnat_z0: wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0
urnat_z0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0
ulnat_z1: wlz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1

ehlnat_x0: wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx0
ehlnat_x1: wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx1
ehlnat_x2: wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx2
ehrnat_y0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly0
ehrnat_y1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly1
ehrnat_z0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz0
ehrnat_z1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1

wlrnat_z_x: wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0

ehrnat_p1_y1: (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1
ehrnat_p1_z0: (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0
ehrnat_p1_z1: (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1

(H_ulnat_yz1 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ ulnat_yz1),
(fun (q : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
   (s : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
    (s0 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
     (s1 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
           whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
      (s2 : urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
       (s3 : urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
        (s4 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
         (s5 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
          (s6 : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q6) =>
        (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)
           (x : (fun s7 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2 =>
                 whiskerR s7 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
                 (ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) b0) =>
         (fun (b1 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1)
            (x3 : (fun s7 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1 =>
                   whiskerR s7 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
                   (ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) b1) =>
          (fun (q7 : wlx0 @ (1 @ 1) = (1 @ 1) @ wlx2)
             (s7 : (b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2 = whiskerL wlx0 1 @ q7) =>
           P b a b a b wlx0 x0 wrx0 wlx1 x1 wrx1 wlx2 x2 wrx2 wly0 y0 1 wly1
             y1 1 wlz0 z0 1 wlz1 z1 1 (wly0 @ wlz0) 
             (1 @ 1) (wly1 @ wlz1) (1 @ 1) q6 urnat_x0 q5 urnat_x1 q4
             urnat_x2 ulnat_y0 urnat_y0 ulnat_y1 urnat_y1 ulnat_z0 urnat_z0
             ulnat_z1 urnat_z1 ulnat_yz0 q3 ulnat_yz1 q2 ehlnat_x0 ehlnat_x1
             ehlnat_x2 ehrnat_y0 ehrnat_y1 ehrnat_z0 ehrnat_z1 q0 q b1
             wlrnat_y_x b0 wlrnat_z_x q7 q1 1 1 1 1 H_ulnat_yz0 s3
             H_ulnat_yz1 s2 s0 s s7 s1 s6 s5 s4 ehrnat_p1_y0 ehrnat_p1_y1
             ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1 x3 x)
            ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
            (equiv_moveL_Mp
               ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
               ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2) (whiskerL wlx0 1) 1))
           (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
             (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
              (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
            concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
           (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)
              ((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^)
              (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
                (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
                 (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @

              1))
          (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @

          (equiv_helper (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)
             ((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^)

             1))
         (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1))
        (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) (rlucancel 1))
       (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) (rlucancel 1))
      ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0))
      (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0))

     ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1))
     (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1))

    (equiv_moveL_Mp
       ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @ ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
       ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1) 
       (whiskerR 1 wrx2) 1))
   ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
   (equiv_moveL_Mp
      ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))

  ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
  (equiv_moveL_Mp
     ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
     ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1)

  
X: Type
a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x5 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y2 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y3 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3)
(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)
(urnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_y3 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y3)
(urnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz1 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz2 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
urnat_y2 [-] urnat_z2 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz2 ->
urnat_y3 [-] urnat_z3 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx5 =
whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
(wlrnat_y_x0 [-] wlrnat_z_x0) @ whiskerL wrx3 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx5 @ wlrnat_yz_x ->
(ehlnat_x3 [I] urnat_x3) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0 ->
(ehlnat_x4 [I] urnat_x4) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(ehlnat_x5 [I] urnat_x5) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [I] ulnat_y2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y2 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [I] ulnat_y3) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y3 ->
(ehrnat_z2 [I] ulnat_z2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z2 ->
(ehrnat_z3 [I] ulnat_z3) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z3 ->

(ehlnat_x3 [-] ehrnat_y2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x0^ ->
whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z3 [-] ehlnat_x5) =
(ehlnat_x4 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x0^ -> Type

b: X

wlrnat_z_x: wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0
H_ulnat_yz0: ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ ulnat_yz0

ehrnat_p1_y1: (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1
ehrnat_p1_z0: (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0
ehrnat_p1_z1: (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1
(fun (q : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
   (s : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
    (s0 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
     (s1 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
      (s2 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
            whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
       (s3 : urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
        (s4 : urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
         (s5 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
          (s6 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q6) =>
        (fun (q7 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
           (s7 : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q7) =>
         (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)
            (x : (fun s8 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2 =>
                  whiskerR s8 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
                  (ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) b0) =>
          (fun (b1 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1)

            P b a b a b wlx0 x0 wrx0 wlx1 x1 wrx1 wlx2 x2 wrx2 wly0 y0 1 wly1
              y1 1 wlz0 z0 1 wlz1 z1 1 (wly0 @ wlz0) 
              (1 @ 1) (wly1 @ wlz1) (1 @ 1) q7 urnat_x0 q6 urnat_x1 q5
              urnat_x2 ulnat_y0 urnat_y0 ulnat_y1 urnat_y1 ulnat_z0 urnat_z0
              ulnat_z1 urnat_z1 ulnat_yz0 q4 q q3 ehlnat_x0 ehlnat_x1
              ehlnat_x2 ehrnat_y0 ehrnat_y1 ehrnat_z0 ehrnat_z1 q1 q0 b1
              wlrnat_y_x b0 wlrnat_z_x q8 q2 1 1 1 1 H_ulnat_yz0 s4 s s3 s1
              s0 s8 s2 s7 s6 s5 ehrnat_p1_y0 ehrnat_p1_y1 ehrnat_p1_z0
              ehrnat_p1_z1 x3 x)
             ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
             (equiv_moveL_Mp
                ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
                ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2) (whiskerL wlx0 1) 1))
            (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
              (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
               (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
             concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
            (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)
               ((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^)
               (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
                 (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
                  (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
                concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
               1))
           (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
             (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @

            concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
           (equiv_helper (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)
              ((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^)

                (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @

              1))
          (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1))
         (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) (rlucancel 1))
        (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) (rlucancel 1))

X: Type
a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x5 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y2 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y3 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3)
(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)
(urnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_y3 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y3)
(urnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)

(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)

(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0 ->
urnat_y2 [-] urnat_z2 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->

(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =

(H_ulnat_yz0 : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ ulnat_yz0),
(fun (q : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
   (s : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
    (s0 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))

   (fun (q2 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
      (s2 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
            whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))

     (fun (q4 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
        (s4 : urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
         (s5 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
          (s6 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q6) =>
        (fun (q7 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)

         (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)

           (fun (q8 : wlx0 @ (1 @ 1) = (1 @ 1) @ wlx2)

            P b a b a b wlx0 x0 wrx0 wlx1 x1 wrx1 wlx2 x2 wrx2 wly0 y0 1 wly1
              y1 1 wlz0 z0 1 wlz1 z1 1 (wly0 @ wlz0) 
              (1 @ 1) (wly1 @ wlz1) (1 @ 1) q7 urnat_x0 q6 urnat_x1 q5
              urnat_x2 ulnat_y0 urnat_y0 ulnat_y1 urnat_y1 ulnat_z0 urnat_z0
              ulnat_z1 urnat_z1 ulnat_yz0 q4 q q3 ehlnat_x0 ehlnat_x1
              ehlnat_x2 ehrnat_y0 ehrnat_y1 ehrnat_z0 ehrnat_z1 q1 q0 b1
              wlrnat_y_x b0 wlrnat_z_x q8 q2 1 1 1 1 H_ulnat_yz0 s4 s s3 s1
              s0 s8 s2 s7 s6 s5 ehrnat_p1_y0 ehrnat_p1_y1 ehrnat_p1_z0
              ehrnat_p1_z1 x3 x)
             ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
             (equiv_moveL_Mp
                ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))

            (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
              (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @

             concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
            (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)
               ((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^)
               (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
                 (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @

               1))

a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)

(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)

(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->

  (fun (q1 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))

   (fun (q2 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))

    (fun (q3 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))

     (fun (q4 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))

      (fun (q5 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))

       (fun (q6 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)

          (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)

             P b a b a b wlx0 x0 wrx0 wlx1 x1 wrx1 wlx2 x2 wrx2 wly0 y0 1

               ulnat_z1 urnat_z1 q q5 q0 q4 ehlnat_x0 ehlnat_x1 ehlnat_x2
               ehrnat_y0 ehrnat_y1 ehrnat_z0 ehrnat_z1 q2 q1 b1 wlrnat_y_x b0
               wlrnat_z_x q9 q3 1 1 1 1 s s5 s0 s4 s2 s1 s9 s3 s8 s7 s6
               ehrnat_p1_y0 ehrnat_p1_y1 ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1 x3 x)
              ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
              (equiv_moveL_Mp
                 ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))

              concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
             (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)
                ((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^)
                (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
                  (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
                   (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
                 concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
                1))
            (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
              (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
               (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
             concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
            (equiv_helper (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)
               ((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^)
               (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
                 (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
                  (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
                concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
               1))
           (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1))
          (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) (rlucancel 1))
         (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) (rlucancel 1))
        ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0))
        (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0))
           (urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
       ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1))
       (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1))
          (urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
      ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @ ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
      (equiv_moveL_Mp
         ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
          ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
         ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1) 
         (whiskerR 1 wrx2) 1))
     ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
     (equiv_moveL_Mp
        ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
        ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
        (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
    ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
    (equiv_moveL_Mp
       ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
       ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
       (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
   ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1))
   (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1))
      (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
  ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0))
  (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0))
     (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0) (whiskerR 1 1) 1)


  
X: Type
a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x5 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y2 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y3 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3)
(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)
(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_y3 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y3)
(urnat_y2 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0 ->
urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z2 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
urnat_y2 [-] urnat_z3 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx5 =
whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
(wlrnat_y_x0 [-] wlrnat_z_x0) @ whiskerL wrx3 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx5 @ wlrnat_yz_x ->
(ehlnat_x3 [I] urnat_x3) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0 ->
(ehlnat_x4 [I] urnat_x4) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(ehlnat_x5 [I] urnat_x5) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [I] ulnat_y2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [I] ulnat_y3) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y2 ->
(ehrnat_z2 [I] ulnat_z2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z2 ->
(ehrnat_z3 [I] ulnat_z3) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z3 ->
whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y3 [-] ehlnat_x4) =
(ehlnat_x3 [-] ehrnat_y2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x0^ ->
whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z3 [-] ehlnat_x5) =
(ehlnat_x4 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x0^ -> Type

b: X
wlx0, x0, wrx0, wlx1, x1, wrx1, wlx2, x2, wrx2: a = b
wly0, y0: b = b
wly1, y1: a = a
wlz0, z0: b = b
wlz1, z1: a = a
urnat_x0: wrx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0
urnat_x1: wrx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1
urnat_x2: wrx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2
ulnat_y0: wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0
ulnat_y1: wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1
urnat_y1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1
ulnat_z0: wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0
urnat_z0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0
ulnat_z1: wlz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1

ehlnat_x1: wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx1
ehlnat_x2: wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx2
ehrnat_y0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly0
ehrnat_y1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly1
ehrnat_z0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz0
ehrnat_z1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1

wlrnat_z_x: wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0
ehrnat_p1_y1: (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1
ehrnat_p1_z0: (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0
ehrnat_p1_z1: (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1
forall (urnat_y0 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y0)
(ehrnat_p1_y0 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0),
(fun (q : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
   (s : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
    (s0 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
     (s1 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
      (s2 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
       (s3 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
             whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
        (s4 : urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
         (s5 : urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
          (s6 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ q6) =>
        (fun (q7 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
           (s7 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q7) =>
         (fun (q8 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
            (s8 : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q8) =>
          (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)
             (x : (fun s9 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2 =>
                   whiskerR s9 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
                   (ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) b0) =>
           (fun (b1 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1)
              (x3 : (fun s9 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1 =>
                     whiskerR s9 1 @ (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1) =
                     (ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) b1) =>
            (fun (q9 : wlx0 @ (1 @ 1) = (1 @ 1) @ wlx2)
               (s9 : (b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2 = whiskerL wlx0 1 @ q9) =>
             P b a b a b wlx0 x0 wrx0 wlx1 x1 wrx1 wlx2 x2 wrx2 wly0 y0 1
               wly1 y1 1 wlz0 z0 1 wlz1 z1 1 (wly0 @ wlz0) 
               (1 @ 1) (wly1 @ wlz1) (1 @ 1) q8 urnat_x0 q7 urnat_x1 q6
               urnat_x2 ulnat_y0 urnat_y0 ulnat_y1 urnat_y1 ulnat_z0 urnat_z0
               ulnat_z1 urnat_z1 q q5 q0 q4 ehlnat_x0 ehlnat_x1 ehlnat_x2
               ehrnat_y0 ehrnat_y1 ehrnat_z0 ehrnat_z1 q2 q1 b1 wlrnat_y_x b0
               wlrnat_z_x q9 q3 1 1 1 1 s s5 s0 s4 s2 s1 s9 s3 s8 s7 s6
               ehrnat_p1_y0 ehrnat_p1_y1 ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1 x3 x)
              ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
              (equiv_moveL_Mp
                 ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
                 ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2) (whiskerL wlx0 1) 1))
             (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
               (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
                (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
              concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
             (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)
                ((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^)
                (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
                  (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
                   (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
                 concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
                1))
            (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
              (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
               (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
             concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
            (equiv_helper (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)
               ((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^)
               (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
                 (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
                  (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
                concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
               1))
           (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1))
          (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) (rlucancel 1))
         (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) (rlucancel 1))
        ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0))
        (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0))
           (urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
       ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1))
       (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1))
          (urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
      ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @ ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
      (equiv_moveL_Mp
         ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
          ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
         ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1) 
         (whiskerR 1 wrx2) 1))
     ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
     (equiv_moveL_Mp

        ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
        (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
    ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
    (equiv_moveL_Mp
       ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
       ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
       (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
   ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1))
   (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1))
      (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
  ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0))
  (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0))
     (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0) (whiskerR 1 1) 1)

  
X: Type
a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x5 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y2 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y3 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3)
(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)
(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_y3 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y3)
(urnat_y2 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0 ->
urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z2 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
urnat_y2 [-] urnat_z3 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx5 =
whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
(wlrnat_y_x0 [-] wlrnat_z_x0) @ whiskerL wrx3 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx5 @ wlrnat_yz_x ->
(ehlnat_x3 [I] urnat_x3) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0 ->
(ehlnat_x4 [I] urnat_x4) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(ehlnat_x5 [I] urnat_x5) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [I] ulnat_y2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [I] ulnat_y3) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y2 ->
(ehrnat_z2 [I] ulnat_z2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z2 ->
(ehrnat_z3 [I] ulnat_z3) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z3 ->
whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y3 [-] ehlnat_x4) =
(ehlnat_x3 [-] ehrnat_y2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x0^ ->
whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z3 [-] ehlnat_x5) =
(ehlnat_x4 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x0^ -> Type

b: X
wlx0, x0, wrx0, wlx1, x1, wrx1, wlx2, x2, wrx2: a = b
wly0, y0: b = b

wlz0, z0: b = b

urnat_x1: wrx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1

ulnat_y0: wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0
ulnat_y1: wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1

ulnat_z0: wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0

ulnat_z1: wlz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1

ehlnat_x1: wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx1
ehlnat_x2: wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx2

ehrnat_y1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly1
ehrnat_z0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz0
ehrnat_z1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1
wlrnat_y_x: wly1 @ wrx1 = wrx0 @ wly0
wlrnat_z_x: wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0

ehrnat_p1_z0: (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0
ehrnat_p1_z1: (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1
(fun (q : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (s : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
    (s0 : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
     (s1 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
      (s2 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
       (s3 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
        (s4 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
              whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
         (s5 : urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
          (s6 : q [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q6) =>
        (fun (q7 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)

         (fun (q8 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
            (s8 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q8) =>
          (fun (q9 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)

           (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)
              (x : (fun s10 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2 =>
                    whiskerR s10 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =

              P b a b a b wlx0 x0 wrx0 wlx1 x1 wrx1 wlx2 x2 wrx2 wly0 y0 1
                wly1 y1 1 wlz0 z0 1 wlz1 z1 1 (wly0 @ wlz0) 
                (1 @ 1) (wly1 @ wlz1) (1 @ 1) q9 urnat_x0 q8 urnat_x1 q7
                urnat_x2 ulnat_y0 q ulnat_y1 urnat_y1 ulnat_z0 urnat_z0
                ulnat_z1 urnat_z1 q0 q6 q1 q5 ehlnat_x0 ehlnat_x1 ehlnat_x2
                ehrnat_y0 ehrnat_y1 ehrnat_z0 ehrnat_z1 q3 q2 b1 wlrnat_y_x
                b0 wlrnat_z_x q10 q4 1 1 1 1 s0 s6 s1 s5 s3 s2 s10 s4 s9 s8
                s7 s ehrnat_p1_y1 ehrnat_p1_z0 ehrnat_p1_z1 x3 x)
               ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
               (equiv_moveL_Mp
                  ((whiskerL wlx0 1)^ @ ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2))
                  ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2) 
                  (whiskerL wlx0 1) 1))
              (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
                (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
                 (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
               concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
              (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)
                 ((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^)
                 (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
                   (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
                    (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
                  concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
                 1))
             (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
               (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @

  (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) (rlucancel 1)

  
X: Type
a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x5 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y2 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y3 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3)
(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)

(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_y3 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y3)
(urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))

(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)

(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0 ->
urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z2 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z3 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx5 =
whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
(wlrnat_y_x0 [-] wlrnat_z_x0) @ whiskerL wrx3 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx5 @ wlrnat_yz_x ->
(ehlnat_x3 [I] urnat_x3) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0 ->
(ehlnat_x4 [I] urnat_x4) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(ehlnat_x5 [I] urnat_x5) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->

ehrnat_p1_z1: (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1
forall (urnat_y1 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1)
(ehrnat_p1_y1 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1),
(fun (q : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (s : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
    (s0 : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))

   (fun (q2 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))

    (fun (q3 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))

     (fun (q4 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))

       (fun (q6 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))

        (fun (q7 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)

a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x5 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y2 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y3 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3)
(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)
(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_y3 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y3)
(urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)

(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))

 (fun (q0 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (s0 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
     (s1 : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))

                 wlrnat_z_x q11 q5 1 1 1 1 s1 s7 s2 s6 s4 s3 s11 s5 s10 s9 s8

                   ((b1 [I] b0) @ whiskerR 1 wlx2)

                 (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^) @
                  (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
                concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
               (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)
                  ((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x^)
                  (((concat_p1 (wlx0 @ 1))^ @
                    (((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 ...^) @
                     (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)^)) @
                   concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
                  1))
              (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
                (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
                 (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
               concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
              (equiv_helper (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)
                 ((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^)
                 (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
                   (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
                    (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
                  concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
                 1))
             (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1))
            (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) (rlucancel 1))
           (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) (rlucancel 1))
          ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q0 [-] urnat_z0))
          (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q0 [-] urnat_z0))
             (q0 [-] urnat_z0) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
         ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q [-] urnat_z1))
         (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q [-] urnat_z1))
            (q [-] urnat_z1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
        ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @ ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
        (equiv_moveL_Mp
           ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
            ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
           ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1) 
           (whiskerR 1 wrx2) 1))
       ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
       (equiv_moveL_Mp
          ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
          ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
          (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
      ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
      (equiv_moveL_Mp
         ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
         ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
         (whiskerR 1 1) 1))

     (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1))

       (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))

  (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) (rlucancel 1)

(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)

(urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)

(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)

(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0 ->

ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->

whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->

whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->

whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->

(fun (q : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (s : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (s0 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (s1 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
      (s2 : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
       (s3 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
        (s4 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
         (s5 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
          (s6 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
                whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q6) =>
        (fun (q7 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
           (s7 : q0 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q7) =>
         (fun (q8 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
            (s8 : q1 [-] q = whiskerR 1 1 @ q8) =>
          (fun (q9 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
             (s9 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ q9) =>
           (fun (q10 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)

            (fun (q11 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
               (s11 : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q11) =>
             (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)
                (x : (fun s12 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2 =>
                      whiskerR s12 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
                      (ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) b0) =>
              (fun (b1 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1)
                 (x3 : (fun s12 : ... @ ... = ... @ ... =>

               (fun (q12 : ... @ ... = ... @ ...) (s12 : ... = ...) =>
                ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...

                  ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
                  ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
                  ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...)
                 ((whiskerL ... ...)^ @ ((... [I] ...) @ whiskerR ... ...))
                 (equiv_moveL_Mp (... @ ...) (... @ ...) (whiskerL ... ...) 1))

                   (((concat_p1 ...)^ @ ((... @ ...) @ ...^)) @

                   1))
               (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @

                  (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
                concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))

                  ((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^)
                  (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
                    (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
                     (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
                   concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
                  1))
              (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1))
             (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) (rlucancel 1))
            (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) (rlucancel 1))
           ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q1 [-] q))
           (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q1 [-] q))

          ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q0 [-] urnat_z1))

         ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @

            ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1)

           ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
           (whiskerR 1 1) 1))

     ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0))
     (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0))

   (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) (rlucancel 1))
  (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) (rlucancel 1)

a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)

(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)

(urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y3) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)

(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y3 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0 ->
urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->

whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
(wlrnat_y_x0 [-] wlrnat_z_x0) @ whiskerL wrx3 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx5 @ wlrnat_yz_x ->

(ehlnat_x4 [I] urnat_x4) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(ehlnat_x5 [I] urnat_x5) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->

(ehrnat_p1_z1 : (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1),
(fun (q : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (s : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (s0 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (s1 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
      (s2 : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
       (s3 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
        (s4 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
         (s5 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
          (s6 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
                whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q6) =>
        (fun (q7 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
           (s7 : q0 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q7) =>
         (fun (q8 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
            (s8 : q1 [-] q = whiskerR 1 1 @ q8) =>
          (fun (q9 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
             (s9 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ q9) =>
           (fun (q10 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
              (s10 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q10) =>
            (fun (q11 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
               (s11 : (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ q11) =>
             (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)
                (x : (fun s12 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2 =>
                      whiskerR s12 1 @ (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2) =
                      (ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 ...^) b0) =>
              (fun (b1 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx1)
                 (x3 : (fun s12 : ... = ... => ... = ...) b1) =>
               (fun (q12 : ... = ...) (s12 : ...) => ...)
                 (...^ @ (... @ ...)) (equiv_moveL_Mp ... ... ... 1))
                (((concat_p1 (... @ ...))^ @
                  (((... [-] ...) @ whiskerL ... ...) @ (... [-] ...)^)) @
                 concat_p1 (1 @ wlx1))
                (equiv_helper (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehlnat_x1)
                   ((ehlnat_x0 [-] ehrnat_y0) @ whiskerL 1 ...^)
                   ((...^ @ (... @ ...)) @ concat_p1 (... @ ...)) 1))
               (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
                 (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^) @
                  (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
                concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
               (equiv_helper (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)
                  ((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x^)
                  (((concat_p1 (wlx1 @ 1))^ @
                    (((ehlnat_x1 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 ...^) @
                     (ehrnat_z1 [-] ehlnat_x2)^)) @
                   concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))
                  1))
              (ehlnat_x0 [I] urnat_x0) (rlucancel 1))
             (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) (rlucancel 1))
            (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) (rlucancel 1))
           ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q1 [-] q))
           (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q1 [-] q))

          ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q0 [-] urnat_z1))
          (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q0 [-] urnat_z1))
             (q0 [-] urnat_z1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
         ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
          ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
         (equiv_moveL_Mp
            ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
             ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
            ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1)

        ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))

   (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) (rlucancel 1))
  (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) (rlucancel 1)

a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x3 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x4 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x5 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y2 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y3 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3)
(urnat_x3 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x3) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4)
(urnat_x4 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x4) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5)
(urnat_x5 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x5) (ulnat_y2 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)
(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_y3 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y3)

(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)

urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->

wlrnat_z_x: wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0

 (fun (q0 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (s0 : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (s1 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (s2 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))

     (fun (q4 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))

                ... ... ...) ((...^ @ (... @ ...)) @ concat_p1 (... @ ...))

a: X

ulnat_y3 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->

whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->

whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->

 (fun (q0 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (s0 : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (s1 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (s2 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
       (s3 : ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
        (s4 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
         (s5 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
          (s6 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q6) =>
        (fun (q7 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
           (s7 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
                 whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q7) =>
         (fun (q8 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
            (s8 : q1 [-] q = whiskerR 1 1 @ q8) =>
          (fun (q9 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z0))
             (s9 : q2 [-] q0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q9) =>
           (fun (q10 : wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
              (s10 : (ehlnat_x2 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ q10) =>

               (s11 : (ehlnat_x1 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ q11) =>

              (fun (b0 : wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlx2)
                 (x : (fun s13 : ... = ... => ... = ...) b0) =>
               (fun (b1 : ... = ...) (x3 : ...) => ...)
                 ((... @ ...) @ concat_p1 ...) (equiv_helper ... ... ... 1))
                (((concat_p1 (... @ ...))^ @
                  (((... [-] ...) @ whiskerL ... ...) @ (... [-] ...)^)) @
                 concat_p1 (1 @ wlx2))

           ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q1 [-] q))

              (q1 [-] q) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
          ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
           ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
          (equiv_moveL_Mp
             ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
              ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
             ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1)
             (whiskerR 1 wrx2) 1))
         ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
         (equiv_moveL_Mp
            ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
            ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
            (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
        ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
        (equiv_moveL_Mp

           ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1)

 (fun (q0 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1) (s0 : (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (s1 : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (s2 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>

  (fun (q1 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (s1 : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>

        (fun (q7 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))

               ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
                ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
               ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1)
               (whiskerR 1 wrx2) 1))
           ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
           (equiv_moveL_Mp
              ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
              ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
              (whiskerR 1 1) 1))

             ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1)

        ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0))
        (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z0))

      (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) (rlucancel 1))
     (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) (rlucancel 1))
    (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) (rlucancel 1))
   wrx0 (rlucancel 1))
  wrx1 (rlucancel 1)

a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x0 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x1 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x2 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y0 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y2 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
(urnat_x0 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
(urnat_x1 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x1) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
(urnat_x2 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x2) (ulnat_y0 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y0)
(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (ulnat_y2 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y2)
(urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y2) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z1 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z2))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y2 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0 ->
urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y2 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx5 =
whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
(wlrnat_y_x0 [-] wlrnat_z_x0) @ whiskerL wrx3 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx5 @ wlrnat_yz_x ->
(ehlnat_x3 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0 ->
(ehlnat_x4 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(ehlnat_x5 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [I] ulnat_y2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1 ->
(ehrnat_z2 [I] ulnat_z2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0 ->
(ehrnat_z3 [I] ulnat_z3) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1 ->
whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y3 [-] ehlnat_x4) =
(ehlnat_x3 [-] ehrnat_y2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x0^ ->
whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z3 [-] ehlnat_x5) =
(ehlnat_x4 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x0^ -> Type
H: ?Goal
b: X
wlx0, wrx0, wlx1, wrx1, wlx2, wrx2: a = b
wly0: b = b
wly1, y1: a = a
wlz0, z0: b = b
wlz1, z1: a = a
ulnat_y1: wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1
ulnat_z0: wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0
ulnat_z1: wlz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1
ehlnat_x0: wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx0
ehlnat_x1: wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx1
ehlnat_x2: wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx2
ehrnat_y0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly0
ehrnat_y1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly1
ehrnat_z0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz0
ehrnat_z1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1
wlrnat_y_x: wly1 @ wrx1 = wrx0 @ wly0
wlrnat_z_x: wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0
(fun (q : b = b) (s : wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : a = b) (s0 : wrx2 @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : a = b) (s1 : wrx1 @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : a = b) (s2 : wrx0 @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1) (s3 : (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (s4 : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (s5 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ q) (s6 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] s) @ 1 = 1 @ q6) =>
        (fun (q7 : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (q @ z0))
           (s7 : s [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q7) =>
         (fun (q8 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
            (s8 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q8) =>
          (fun (q9 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
             (s9 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 =
                   whiskerR 1 1 @ q9) =>
           (fun (q10 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
              (s10 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 =
                     whiskerR 1 1 @ q10) =>
            (fun (q11 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
               (s11 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
                      whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q11) =>
             (fun (q12 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
                (s12 : q5 [-] q3 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q12) =>
              (fun (q13 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (q @ z0))
                 (s13 : q6 [-] q4 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q13) =>
               (fun (q14 : ... @ ... = ... @ ...) (s14 : ... = ...) =>
                ... ... ...) (ehlnat_x2 [I] s0) (rlucancel 1))
                ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q6 [-] q4))
                (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q6 [-] q4)) 
                   (q6 [-] q4) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
               ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q5 [-] q3))
               (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q5 [-] q3)) 
                  (q5 [-] q3) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
              ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
               ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
              (equiv_moveL_Mp
                 ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
                  ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
                 ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1)
                 (whiskerR 1 wrx2) 1))
             ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
             (equiv_moveL_Mp
                ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
                ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
                (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
            ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
            (equiv_moveL_Mp
               ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
               ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
               (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
           ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1))
           (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1))
              (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
          ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s [-] ulnat_z0))
          (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s [-] ulnat_z0))
             (s [-] ulnat_z0) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
         (ehrnat_y0 [I] s) (rlucancel 1))
        (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) (rlucancel 1))
       (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) (rlucancel 1))
      (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) (rlucancel 1))
     wrx0 (rlucancel 1))
    wrx1 (rlucancel 1))
   wrx2 (rlucancel 1))
  wly0 (rlucancel 1)

  
X: Type
a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x0 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x1 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x2 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y0 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y1 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
(urnat_x0 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
(urnat_x1 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x1) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
(urnat_x2 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x2) (ulnat_y0 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y0)
(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (ulnat_y1 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y1)
(urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z1 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z2))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)
(wlpp_yz1 : wly3 @ wlz3 = wlyz1),
ulnat_y0 [-] ulnat_z2 = whiskerR wlpp_yz0 1 @ ulnat_yz0 ->
urnat_y0 [-] urnat_z0 = whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ urnat_yz0 ->
ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z3 = whiskerR wlpp_yz1 1 @ ulnat_yz1 ->
urnat_y1 [-] urnat_z1 = whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ urnat_yz1 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz0 1 @ ehrnat_yz0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [-] ehrnat_z3) @ whiskerL 1 wlpp_yz1 =
whiskerR wrpp_yz1 1 @ ehrnat_yz1 ->
(wlrnat_x_y [I] wlrnat_x_z) @ whiskerR wrpp_yz1 wlx5 =
whiskerL wlx3 wrpp_yz0 @ wlrnat_x_yz ->
(wlrnat_y_x0 [-] wlrnat_z_x0) @ whiskerL wrx3 wlpp_yz0 =
whiskerR wlpp_yz1 wrx5 @ wlrnat_yz_x ->
(ehlnat_x3 [I] urnat_x0) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x0 ->
(ehlnat_x4 [I] urnat_x1) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x1 ->
(ehlnat_x5 [I] urnat_x2) @ 1 = 1 @ ulnat_x2 ->
(ehrnat_y2 [I] ulnat_y0) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y0 ->
(ehrnat_y3 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_y1 ->
(ehrnat_z2 [I] ulnat_z2) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z0 ->
(ehrnat_z3 [I] ulnat_z3) @ 1 = 1 @ urnat_z1 ->
whiskerR wlrnat_x_y 1 @ (ehrnat_y3 [-] ehlnat_x4) =
(ehlnat_x3 [-] ehrnat_y2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_y_x0^ ->
whiskerR wlrnat_x_z 1 @ (ehrnat_z3 [-] ehlnat_x5) =
(ehlnat_x4 [-] ehrnat_z2) @ whiskerL 1 wlrnat_z_x0^ -> Type
H: ?Goal
b: X
wlx0, wrx0, wlx1, wrx1, wlx2, wrx2: a = b
wly0: b = b
wly1: a = a
wlz0, z0: b = b
wlz1, z1: a = a
ulnat_z0: wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z0
ulnat_z1: wlz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1
ehlnat_x0: wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx0
ehlnat_x1: wlx1 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx1
ehlnat_x2: wlx2 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx2
ehrnat_y0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly0
ehrnat_y1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly1
ehrnat_z0: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz0
ehrnat_z1: 1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz1
wlrnat_y_x: wly1 @ wrx1 = wrx0 @ wly0
wlrnat_z_x: wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0
forall (y1 : a = a) (ulnat_y1 : wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1),
(fun (q : b = b) (s : wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ q) =>
 (fun (q0 : a = b) (s0 : wrx2 @ 1 = 1 @ q0) =>
  (fun (q1 : a = b) (s1 : wrx1 @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : a = b) (s2 : wrx0 @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>
    (fun (q3 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z1) (s3 : (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) @ 1 = 1 @ q3) =>
     (fun (q4 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ z0) (s4 : (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>
      (fun (q5 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (s5 : (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) @ 1 = 1 @ q5) =>
       (fun (q6 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ q) (s6 : (ehrnat_y0 [I] s) @ 1 = 1 @ q6) =>
        (fun (q7 : (wly0 @ wlz0) @ 1 = 1 @ (q @ z0))
           (s7 : s [-] ulnat_z0 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q7) =>
         (fun (q8 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
            (s8 : ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q8) =>
          (fun (q9 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly1 @ wlz1))
             (s9 : (ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1 =
                   whiskerR 1 1 @ q9) =>
           (fun (q10 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
              (s10 : (ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1 =
                     whiskerR 1 1 @ q10) =>
            (fun (q11 : (wly1 @ wlz1) @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ (wly0 @ wlz0))
               (s11 : (wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1 =
                      whiskerR 1 wrx2 @ q11) =>
             (fun (q12 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z1))
                (s12 : q5 [-] q3 = whiskerR 1 1 @ q12) =>
              (fun (q13 : (1 @ 1) @ 1 = 1 @ (q @ z0))
                 (s13 : q6 [-] q4 = whiskerR ... ... @ q13) =>
               (fun (q14 : ... = ...) (s14 : ...) => ...) 
                 (ehlnat_x2 [I] s0) (rlucancel 1))
                ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q6 [-] q4))
                (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR ... ...)^ @ (q6 [-] q4))
                   (q6 [-] q4) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
               ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q5 [-] q3))
               (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (q5 [-] q3)) 
                  (q5 [-] q3) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
              ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
               ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
              (equiv_moveL_Mp
                 ((whiskerR 1 wrx2)^ @
                  ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1))
                 ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1)
                 (whiskerR 1 wrx2) 1))
             ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
             (equiv_moveL_Mp
                ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1))
                ((ehrnat_y0 [-] ehrnat_z0) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
                (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
            ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
            (equiv_moveL_Mp
               ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1))
               ((ehrnat_y1 [-] ehrnat_z1) @ whiskerL 1 1) 
               (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
           ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1))
           (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1))
              (ulnat_y1 [-] ulnat_z1) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
          ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s [-] ulnat_z0))
          (equiv_moveL_Mp ((whiskerR 1 1)^ @ (s [-] ulnat_z0))
             (s [-] ulnat_z0) (whiskerR 1 1) 1))
         (ehrnat_y0 [I] s) (rlucancel 1))
        (ehrnat_y1 [I] ulnat_y1) (rlucancel 1))
       (ehrnat_z0 [I] ulnat_z0) (rlucancel 1))
      (ehrnat_z1 [I] ulnat_z1) (rlucancel 1))
     wrx0 (rlucancel 1))
    wrx1 (rlucancel 1))
   wrx2 (rlucancel 1))
  wly0 (rlucancel 1)

  
X: Type
a: X
P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x0 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x1 wrx4 : c = d)
(wlx5 x2 wrx5 : e = f) (wly2 y0 wry0 : b0 = d) (wly3 y1 wry1 : a = c)
(wlz2 z2 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz3 z3 wrz1 : c = e) (wlyz0 wryz0 : b0 = f)
(wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e) (ulnat_x0 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)
(urnat_x0 : wrx3 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (ulnat_x1 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x1)
(urnat_x1 : wrx4 @ 1 = 1 @ x1) (ulnat_x2 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x2)
(urnat_x2 : wrx5 @ 1 = 1 @ x2) (ulnat_y0 : wly2 @ 1 = 1 @ y0)
(urnat_y0 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ y0) (ulnat_y1 : wly3 @ 1 = 1 @ y1)
(urnat_y1 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ y1) (ulnat_z2 : wlz2 @ 1 = 1 @ z2)
(urnat_z0 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ z2) (ulnat_z3 : wlz3 @ 1 = 1 @ z3)
(urnat_z1 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ z3) (ulnat_yz0 : wlyz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z2))
(urnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ (y0 @ z2))
(ulnat_yz1 : wlyz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z3))
(urnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ (y1 @ z3)) (ehlnat_x3 : wlx3 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx3)
(ehlnat_x4 : wlx4 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx4) (ehlnat_x5 : wlx5 @ 1 = 1 @ wrx5)
(ehrnat_y2 : wry0 @ 1 = 1 @ wly2) (ehrnat_y3 : wry1 @ 1 = 1 @ wly3)
(ehrnat_z2 : wrz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz2) (ehrnat_z3 : wrz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlz3)
(ehrnat_yz0 : wryz0 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz0) (ehrnat_yz1 : wryz1 @ 1 = 1 @ wlyz1)
(wlrnat_x_y : wlx3 @ wry0 = wry1 @ wlx4)
(wlrnat_y_x0 : wly3 @ wrx4 = wrx3 @ wly2)
(wlrnat_x_z : wlx4 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_z_x0 : wlz3 @ wrx5 = wrx4 @ wlz2)
(wlrnat_x_yz : wlx3 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx5)
(wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx5 = wrx3 @ wlyz0) (wrpp_yz0 : wry0 @ wrz0 = wryz0)
(wlpp_yz0 : wly2 @ wlz2 = wlyz0) (wrpp_yz1 : wry1 @ wrz1 = wryz1)

  (fun (q1 : b = b) (s1 : wly0 @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : a = b) (s2 : wrx2 @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>

                   ((wlrnat_y_x [-] wlrnat_z_x) @ whiskerL wrx0 1)

      wrx1 (rlucancel 1))

   wly1 (rlucancel 1))
  wlz0 (rlucancel 1)

P: forall (b0 c d e f : X) (wlx3 x0 wrx3 : a = b0) (wlx4 x1 wrx4 : c = d)

  (fun (q1 : b = b) (s1 : wlz0 @ 1 = 1 @ q1) =>
   (fun (q2 : a = a) (s2 : wly1 @ 1 = 1 @ q2) =>

     (fun (q4 : a = b) (s4 : wrx2 @ 1 = 1 @ q4) =>

         (fun (q8 : 1 @ 1 = 1 @ q1) (s8 : (ehrnat_z0 [I] s1) @ 1 = 1 @ q8) =>

                 (s13 : (... [-] ...) @ whiskerL ... ... =

                 (...^ @ (... @ ...)) (equiv_moveL_Mp ... ... ... 1))

                   ((whiskerR ... ...)^ @ ((... [-] ...) @ whiskerL ... ...))

a: X
lem: forall
P : forall (b c d e f : X) (wlx0 x0 wrx0 : a = b) 
    (wlx1 x1 wrx1 : c = d) (wlx2 x2 wrx2 : e = f) 
    (wly0 y0 wry0 : b = d) (wly1 y1 wry1 : a = c) 
    (wlz0 z0 wrz0 : d = f) (wlz1 z1 wrz1 : c = e) 
    (wlyz0 wryz0 : b = f) (wlyz1 wryz1 : a = e)
    (ulnat_x0 : wlx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0) (urnat_x0 : wrx0 @ 1 = 1 @ x0)

    (wlrnat_y_x : wly1 @ wrx1 = wrx0 @ wly0)
    (wlrnat_x_z : wlx1 @ wrz0 = wrz1 @ wlx2)
    (wlrnat_z_x : wlz1 @ wrx2 = wrx1 @ wlz0)
    (wlrnat_x_yz : wlx0 @ wryz0 = wryz1 @ wlx2)
    (wlrnat_yz_x : wlyz1 @ wrx2 = wrx0 @ wlyz0)
